title: leadv2 context.yaml verification block
description: Schema for the optional verification.criteria[] typed checklist (Looper-style). Existing live_signal/probe/timeout keys remain valid and unchanged.

live_signal.description: Human-readable description of the expected live signal (always required)

criteria.description: OPTIONAL typed criteria list. When present ALL items must pass before verify succeeds. When absent behavior is identical to the existing live_signal/probe path.

id.description: Short slug identifying this criterion e.g. row-inserted or no-5xx

type.description: programmatic: run a shell command; judge: present rubric for pass/revise; human: manual gate requiring founder confirmation

check.description: Required when type==programmatic. argv of the shell command to run

contains.description: Required when expect==stdout_contains. Substring that must appear in stdout

rubric.description: Required when type==judge. Rubric presented to judge; response must be pass or revise

prompt.description: Required when type==human. Instruction shown to founder at the manual gate
